query:
UPDATE sync_logs
SET status = 'error', 
    error_message = 'Force-cleared: stuck in_progress (abandoned after 20+ min)',
    finished_at = NOW()
WHERE status = 'in_progress'
  AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 20 MINUTE;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
UPDATE sync_logs
SET status = 'error', 
    error_message = 'Force-cleared: stuck in_progress (abandoned after 20+ min)',
    finished_at = NOW()
WHERE status = 'in_progress'
  AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 20 MINUTE;
